recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.

recommendations.title: Cyberbully
recommendations.overview: A woman tries to help her teenage daughter when she becomes the victim of online bullying.

recommendations.title: Killing Daddy
recommendations.overview: When Cassie's father finds himself vulnerable and bedridden, she believes she has the perfect revenge for her mother's death.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Carjacked
recommendations.overview: A single mom and her child are carjacked by a bank robber who has no intention of letting them go.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Bridesmaids
recommendations.overview: Two women plot revenge against the woman marrying their friend's ex-boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Edukators
recommendations.overview: Three activists cobble together a kidnapping plot after they encounter a businessman in his home.

recommendations.title: Too Young to Die
recommendations.overview: An abused 15 year old is charged with a murder that carries the death penalty in this fact-based story.

recommendations.title: Only Mine
recommendations.overview: Tormented and left for dead by a scorned lover, a woman finds the strength within herself to recover and retaliate against her abuser.
